summary: Backend API testing for Vinyl Siding Estimator. 17/17 pytest tests passed covering auth (register/login/logout/me/wrong-password/unauth-guard), catalog (defaults/update/reset), estimates (CRUD + user isolation), file uploads (post & serve), and email endpoints (status unconfigured + 503 on send). All endpoints behaved as expected.

minor.issue: CORS_ORIGINS defaults to '*' while allow_credentials=True. Browsers reject credentialed requests with wildcard origin. Backend tests via requests still work, but a frontend on a different origin would fail to send cookies. Recommend explicit origin list in production.

delete_cookie does not pass the same samesite='none'/secure=True/path='/' attributes used by set_cookie. Some clients (browsers) may not properly clear the cookie. Confirmed /me still returns 401 after manually clearing cookies; works for API consumers.
Deprecated FastAPI event handlers; consider lifespan context manager.

action_items: Optionally tighten CORS_ORIGINS to explicit frontend origin(s) instead of '*' since cookies+credentials are used.
Optionally pass samesite='none', secure=True, path='/' to response.delete_cookie in /api/auth/logout for reliable browser cookie clearing.
Migrate from deprecated on_event startup/shutdown to lifespan.
critical_code_review_comments: JWT_SECRET falls back to a random per-process value; if env var missing, tokens are invalidated on every backend restart. Currently set in .env so OK, but make it fail-fast in production.
Email endpoint imports 'resend' lazily inside the handler — fine, but ensure 'resend' is in requirements when key is configured.
Uploads have no MIME validation beyond extension; relies on extension only. Acceptable for MVP.
seed_data_creation: Test users created with TEST_ / random uuid prefixes; estimates with TEST_ customer names are deleted in flows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 17 backend tests pass against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Cookie auth via requests.Session() works. Admin auto-seeded on startup. Email send correctly returns 503 with detail 'Email service not configured. Add RESEND_API_KEY to enable.' when RESEND_API_KEY is empty. User isolation enforced via 404 for cross-user access. Catalog has exactly 10 sections; first item 'Conquest' mat=92.19 lab=125.
